scores.correctness_notes: Correctly identifies IngressPerAppRequirer, v2 library path, on.ready/on.revoked events, and url property. Goes beyond the gold standard's schema-focused answer with useful Python API detail, all of which appears accurate.
scores.hallucination_notes: is_ready() method is uncertain — the library typically exposes readiness via the url property being non-None rather than a dedicated is_ready() method. The constructor params (strip_prefix, redirect_https, scheme, host, ip) and provide_ingress_requirements() are real. Minor uncertainty on is_ready() warrants a 1.
